sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT LastProcessedValue
FROM WatermarkTable
WHERE Table_Name = '@{item().SourceTable}'

@if(
empty(item().IncrementalColumn),
concat('SELECT * FROM ',item().SourceSchema,'.',item().SourceTable),
concat(
'SELECT * FROM ',
item().SourceSchema,'.',item().SourceTable,
' WHERE ',
item().IncrementalColumn,
' >= ''',
activity('ACT_GEN_LKP_Watermark').output.firstRow.LastProcessedValue,
''' ORDER BY ',
item().IncrementalColumn
)
)

SELECT LastProcessedValue
FROM WatermarkTable
WHERE Table_Name = '@{item().SourceTable}'
